🔑 Anthropic API Key

Required for AI-powered features (GSTR Library PDF analysis). In the Power Pages deployment the key is stored in your browser session only and never persisted to disk.

📦 MIS Full Data Download

Download a complete backup of all MIS data. Choose format — JSON is a full machine-readable backup; Excel exports key sections as spreadsheets.

💡 Tip: Save the JSON backup periodically as your master backup. The Excel workbook is for analysis and sharing — it does not include binary file attachments (PDFs in GSTR Library).
